data.name: Sexy Girls Posing Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
Sexy Girls Posing Puzzle is a casual swapping-style puzzle game that combines relaxing gameplay with high-quality character artwork. Solve progressively challenging stages and unlock new images as you advance through the experience.

🧩 Progressive Swapping Puzzle Gameplay

Rearrange tiles to complete each illustration. Difficulty increases naturally throughout the levels, and players seeking an added challenge can switch to Hard Mode for more demanding layouts.

🌟 12 Featured Characters

Unlock the next level! Each girl has multiple progression stages. Once you clear the initial puzzle, you can access her special versions by selecting her again. Jump straight into the sexier illustrations, or—if you’re up for a challenge—try to beat the previous stage in Hard Mode.

📷 High-Quality Artwork

All character illustrations are presented in high-resolution detail.

🖼️ Unlockable Gallery

Finish puzzles to expand your gallery and revisit any completed artwork at any time.

🎵 Relaxed Soundtrack

Enjoy a calm, lofi-inspired audio backdrop designed to enhance the overall puzzle-solving experience.

data.short_description: Sexy Girls Posing Puzzle — A relaxing swapping-puzzle game featuring beautiful high-resolution girls, progressive stages, a gallery to unlock, chill lofi music, and an optional Hard Mode for extra challenge.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 日文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 305 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • Storage: 305 MB available space
